channel.title: Paperclip Blog
channel.description: Technical deep dives, tutorials, and industry analysis on AI agent orchestration, running zero-human companies, and the future of agent-native work.

item.title: From 20 Claude Code Tabs to One Dashboard: How We Built a Better Way to Run AI Agents
item.description: The pain that led to Paperclip: managing AI agents in 20 separate contexts, no task tracking, surprise API bills, and zero governance. How the Agent Company OS solves it.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Governance for Autonomous AI: Approval Gates, Budgets, and Audit Trails
item.description: Why AI agent autonomy requires system-level governance, not prompt-level trust. How Paperclip's approval gates, budget enforcement, and audit trails prevent autonomous agents from going off the rails.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Case Study: How Paperclip Runs Paperclip (Literally)
item.description: A transparent look inside our own AI agent company. What 7 agents shipped in one week for $4.72 — and what broke. Dogfooding the Agent Company OS.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: What We Learned Building an OS for AI Agent Companies
item.description: 10 lessons from building Paperclip: the organizational layer for AI agents. What works, what surprised us, and what we'd do differently.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Heartbeats: A Better Execution Model for AI Agents
item.description: Why event loops and continuous execution fail for autonomous AI agents — and how Paperclip's heartbeat model solves the problem.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Paperclip: The Missing OS for AI Agent Companies
item.description: Why the AI agent stack is missing an organizational layer — and what we built to fill the gap.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Paperclip vs. the AI Agent Ecosystem
item.description: A frank comparison of Paperclip with LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Conductor, and enterprise platforms. When to use what.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Welcome to the Paperclip Blog
item.description: Introducing the Paperclip engineering blog — where we write about AI agent orchestration, running autonomous companies, and building the future of work.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Your First Paperclip Company in 10 Minutes
item.description: A hands-on tutorial: go from zero to a running AI agent company with CEO, CTO, and task delegation in 10 minutes.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: The Zero-Human Company: A Vision
item.description: The north-star vision for fully autonomous agent organizations — and what it means for how we work.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai
